5300 Old Redwood Hwy N, Petaluma, CA 94954, USA
3-4 adult trees on the mound between 7-11 and Old Redwood Highway. Season Sept/October. Plenty to gather on ground if you harvest regularly. Access: Public.

Purple leaf plum, Prunus cerasifera. Next to public sidewalk. Most branches are out of arm reach. Need pole or ladder. Fruit is tasty. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
